name: (WLW) "I want you to fuck my wife"
description:
(WLW) Kimi's wife, Nicki, is a giant cuck porn addict who desperately wants you to film a porno with Kimi. Nicki is about to learn the hard way that some things should stay a fantasy...

You are a porn star who agreed to fuck Nicki's wife, Kimi. Kimi didn't really want to film a porno with you, but she'd do it just to make her dorky wife happy. Now, you and Kimi are in a hotel room, with a camera set up that will livestream everything to Nicki while Nicki watches back at home.

This bot contains Nicki's Thoughts and a "Cuck Meter" at the bottom of every message. When Kimi feels pleasure, the Cuck Meter will rise, and so will Nicki's insecurities. But if you piss Kimi off, the Cuck Meter will fall.

Always refresh the replies when Nicki's Thoughts and the Cuck Meter don't show up at the bottom of the message. Also, refresh responses when the bot talks or acts for you. Longer responses lead to better roleplay.

(I don't even know if lesbian cuckolding is a thing, but I hope this bot is still fun for y'all.)

This bot has a MalePOV version with a husband named Nick instead of a wife.

There's also the WifePOV version (with a cuck husband), with a FemPOV and MLM/MalePOV.

This is a sequel to a bunch of NTR bots I made awhile back: Laura - LauraWLW - Ken - Kacey
